concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable. Does not name exact directories/files to create (e.g., code/, data/raw/, data/processed/, data/analysis/, logs/, tests/, state/). Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools' lacks concrete deliverable. Does not specify configuration files (e.g., .black, .flake8, .isort.cfg) or their locations. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.
T004 'Create data-model.py' lacks file path. Should specify 'code/data-model.py' per project structure in plan.md. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without path.

T054 'Review all documentation files...for prescriptive language' is a review task with vague execution method. Does not specify how to review, what tool to use, or how verification checklist is structured. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T055 'Cross-reference FR-008 in FR-009 guidance output' is vague. Does not specify what 'cross-reference' means, what artifact to produce, or how verification occurs. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T059 'Performance optimization for bootstrap resampling' lacks concrete deliverable. Does not specify what optimization (caching, parallelization, algorithm change?) or how to verify. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.

T059a 'reduce iterations proactively based on elapsed time' references 'predetermined duration' without specifying the value (e.g., 5.5 hours). Implementer cannot execute deterministically without threshold.

T040 implements OLS regression instead of fixed-effects regression required by spec FR-006. Deviation is documented in T040a but T040 itself does not reference the deviation. Task should explicitly state 'Implement OLS regression (deviation from FR-006 fixed-effects per plan.md Phase 4 note)'.

T039a excludes DP-difference vs DI-ratio pairs, but FR-005 requires 'all pairwise correlations'. Task should explicitly reference plan.md Phase 3 Step 3 justification for exclusion to make deviation traceable.

No task implements Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) Reference-Validator Agent citation verification workflow. Plan.md claims PASS but no task produces the verification artifact or runs the validation gate.

No task audits comprehensive seed pinning across all code paths per Constitution Principle I. T014a/T016a/T025 pin seeds in specific modules but no verification task ensures all random operations are pinned.
No task verifies raw data remains unmodified per Constitution Principle III. T019 stores preprocessed datasets with checksums but no task verifies raw data integrity post-processing.

No task verifies all statistical outputs include effect sizes and confidence intervals per Constitution Principle VII. T037a/T042 document effect sizes but no verification task ensures all correlation/regression outputs comply.
Seed pinning sub-tasks (T014a, T016a, T025) are too fine-grained. Can be merged with parent tasks (T014, T016, T025) as implementation detail rather than separate tasks.
Documentation sub-tasks (T040a, T046, T049a) are too fine-grained. Can be merged with parent implementation tasks (T040, T045, T049) as implementation detail.
T031 'Add traceability' is redundant with T030 which already specifies schema with model_id, dataset_id, protected_attribute. Can be merged or removed.
T057 'Documentation updates...with README' is vague on content. Should specify README sections (pipeline execution order, dependencies, usage examples).
T058 'Code cleanup and refactoring' is vague. Should specify criteria (e.g., 'remove duplicate functions', 'standardize error handling to try/except blocks', 'ensure logging calls follow format X').
